_comment: High-frequency gaming chain. Centralized sequencer = sub-second seal (no committee round-trip latency); NeoFS DA keeps frequent state updates in the canonical N4 data-availability layer without L1 calldata cost; permissionlessExit stays true so users can always escape if the centralized sequencer goes rogue. milestonePerBlockMs=1000 favors throughput over batch density. Trades sequencer-trust for speed — pick when asset-loss radius is bounded (e.g. in-game items, not custodied assets). See samples/README.md.
